name: Search

variants.name: filter
variants.description: Filters a visible dataset. Search triggers as user types. No suggestions dropdown.

variants.name: with_suggestions
variants.description: Shows a result list below the field. Includes loading, no-results and lazy-load states.

placeholder.note: Always provide placeholder text when field is empty.

on_reset.note: Reset icon appears after user types. Clears field.

suggestion_display.stacking: Result list overlays content below — does not shift layout

elevation.note: Suggestions list uses higher stacking order — does not affect surrounding layout

usage_rules.detail: The search field must always have a placeholder text when empty. Never leave it blank.

usage_rules.rule: Do not use on small datasets
usage_rules.detail: Do not add a search field to a small set of data that doesn't benefit from filtering.
When no results match, show the Empty state component. For with_suggestions variant, show an appropriate status message in the hint area.
While suggestions are loading, display Loading results with an indeterminate progress indicator.

usage_rules.rule: Can be placed in universal action bar
usage_rules.detail: Search field can be placed within the universal action bar above a table or container.

confidence_blockers: If ticket adds search to a small static list, flag as usage_rule warning.
If ticket does not handle the no-results state, flag — Empty state must be shown.

embedding_text: Search field component. Filter content or show suggestions dropdown. Always has placeholder text. Reset icon after typing. Suggestions variant shows result list with loading lazy load no results states. Empty state on no results. Can be placed in universal action bar above table. Do not use on small datasets.
